mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.equipment_name, e.location, e.status, e.description, e.image_url, e.purchase_date, e.type_code, et.type_name, e.equipment_no, e.create_time FROM fitness_equipment e LEFT JOIN fitness_equipment_type et ON e.type_code = et.type_code AND et.deleted = false WHERE e.id = #{equipmentId} AND e.deleted = false

SELECT er.id, er.equipment_id as equipmentId, er.user_id as userId, u.username as userName, er.description, er.image_url as imageUrl, er.status, er.handle_time as handleTime, er.handle_remark as handleRemark, er.create_time as createTime FROM fitness_equipment_repair er LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON er.user_id = u.id WHERE er.equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND er.deleted = false ORDER BY er.create_time DESC
